div.t-attf-style: border:2px dashed {{report_color}}; height:80px; width:100%; position:relative; padding:10px; box-sizing:border-box;

div.style: position:absolute; left:0; right:0; bottom:35px; display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center;

div.t-att-style: ' position:absolute; bottom:0px; left:0;margin:20px 10px 10px 10px; right:0; text-align:center;border-top:2px solid %s;'%report_color

div.t-attf-style: border:2px dashed {{report_color}}; height:80px; width:100%; position:relative; padding:10px; box-sizing:border-box;

div.style: position:absolute; left:0; right:0; bottom:35px; display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center;

div.t-att-style: ' position:absolute; bottom:0px; left:0;margin:20px 10px 10px 10px; right:0; text-align:center;border-top:2px solid %s;'%report_color
